ksa_text: Knowledge of model inventory management practices including model tiering by materiality and complexity, risk classification, lifecycle tracking from development through retirement, and documentation standards.

Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RM-K-011 (Risk Management/Knowledge) scores 0.426 composite (highest: NICE at 0.426). Scope is edge_case for Algorithmic Trading Engineer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Risk Management, composite 0.426. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Risk Management for Algorithmic Trading Engineer at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Risk Management appears in ~45% of Algorithmic Trading Engineer postings as a secondary competency. Risk modeling (VaR, drawdown, stress) appears in senior ATE profiles. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Risk Management without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Revised to exclude. Risk Management without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
